name: U Din Din Din Din Dun Ma Din Din Din Dun
short_name: Odindin Dean Dean Dunmadin Dean Dundun
lore:
Lore of U Din Din Din Din Dun Ma Din Din Din Dun
                                    


This character embodies a striking physique reminiscent of a bodybuilder, complete with vibrant orange hair. In the majority of videos, the second image featuring this character is more frequently showcased. While it may not have a prominent role in the versus video, it is portrayed as a robust figure, albeit with a slight imperfection on the head of Tung Tung Safre. The character is affectionately nicknamed 'U DIN DIN DUN MA DIN DIN DUN,' a playful abbreviation of a longer title. Interestingly, there exists a backstory suggesting that this character's transformation into an orange was triggered by an ordinary individual's consumption of orange seeds.
Description original text
Udin Din Din Din Dun, Ma Din Din Din Dun, merupakan sosok jeruk yang memiliki mata dan mulut, dulunya ia hanyalah seorang manusia biasa. Karena sering menelan biji jeruk, ia alhasil berubah menjadi Udin Din Din Din Dun Jeruk.
UDIN DIN DIN DIN DUN, MA DIN DIN DIN DUN, orange model with eyes and mouth. Although he was an ordinary person, it was eventually turned into UDIN DIN DIN DIN DIN DUN Orange because of the habit of frequently eating orange seeds.
